blocks.text: Arsenal to CL semis; PSG end Liverpool's European dream

Arsenal held Sporting CP to a 0-0 — enough to reach the CL semis even without Ødegaard. The bigger shock: PSG won 2-0 to dump Liverpool out. Bayern's 4-3 thriller over Real Madrid the night's standout.
🎮 IEM Rio 2026 — rain (Nygaard) hunting CS2 Major glory in Brazil [ongoing ★5]
